$comment: EXAMPLE action chain (copy this shape for real chains). Generate an artifact for the task ($input), grounded in the kb (search), check it with the example_check oracle, and repair ONCE if it fails: generate -> check -> done | fix -> recheck -> done | fail. The repair is bounded (one retry) and unrolled (no cycle) so it lints clean and always terminates. To repair twice, add fix2/recheck2 and point recheck.on_failure at fix2 (see examples/dotnet flows/add_file).
summary: Example: generate an artifact grounded in the knowledge base, verify it with the oracle, and repair once if the check fails.
